description_long: This shotgun features a robust design with a matte olive-green metal body and wooden accents on the stock and fore-end. The receiver is adorned with a stylized yellow marking, and the shotgun is equipped with a black cylindrical barrel and a visible pump-action mechanism beneath it. A dark green sling is attached, looping from the stock to the barrel, suggesting portability. The stock is full-sized and made of wood, providing stability and comfort for the user. Two red shotgun shells are visible, one positioned near the loading port and another floating nearby, indicating its ammunition type. The overall construction appears durable, with a hard, slightly textured finish suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, olive-green and wood pump-action shotgun with a full stock, black barrel, and attached sling, accompanied by red shotgun shells. The design is sturdy and functional, with visible pump and loading features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the end of the wooden stock, with a red shell visible to the side.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full wooden stock, olive-green receiver with yellow marking, black barrel, and attached sling, with a red shell near the loading port.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the linear alignment of the barrel and stock, with the red shell positioned beside the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the pump-action fore-end, full wooden stock, black barrel, and sling, with two red shells visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
